title: Blush
description: Adds HDR bloom to vanilla minecraft! (polytone)
body:
![pictureframe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/145f6abab6e3979ec0acf1638071990d30b95c9c_0.webp)
## Blush adds HDR bloom to vanilla minecraft via polytone!
_(polytone is required for this to work so technically not vanilla)_

### compatible with sodium!

also i STRONGLY advise you use this amazing mod [packed packs](https://modrinth.com/mod/packed-packs) as this resourcepack might cause resourcepack errors semi frequently so itd be best to save a preset of your resourcepack selection

(also for the best experience use a resource pack that adds emissive textures via continuity or its own core shaders i highly recommend [emissive shaders](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/emissive+shaders) or [luminous vanilla](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/luminous-vanilla))

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/wCYu_7W3l_E" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
